title: Senior Frontend Developer at Capital Float

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Capital Float
jsonLd.description:
Join the Capital Float family as a Frontend Developer in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Capital Float:
Capital Float is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float!
